content:
STANDARD TUNING, CAPO ON 3RD FRET!


Wha- wha- what did she say

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]
Mmmm whatcha say, [/tab]
[tab]             [ch]B[/ch]          [ch]A[/ch]
Mmm that you only meant well?[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
Well of course you did[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]
Mmm watcha say,[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]B[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]
Mmm that it's all for the best[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
because it is.[/tab]

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]
I was so wrong for so long[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]                     [ch]A[/ch]
Only tryin' to please myself (myself)[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Em[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]
Girl, I was caught up in her lust[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]                        [ch]A[/ch]
When I don't really want no one else[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Em[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]
So, no I know I should of treated you better[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]                   [ch]A[/ch]
But me and you were meant to last forever[/tab]

[Hook]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                       [ch]G[/ch]     
So let me in (let me in) give me another chance (another chance)[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]                 [ch]A[/ch]
To really be your man[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]C[/ch]                    [ch]G[/ch]
Cause when the roof cave in and the truth came out[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]B[/ch]                   [ch]A[/ch]
I just didn't know what to do[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]                     [ch]G[/ch]
But when I become a star we'll be living so large[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]B[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]
I'll do anything for you[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
So tell me girl[/tab]
